headline: Evercore ISI Group Maintains Outperform on Baxter International, Lowers Price Target to $22
summary: Evercore ISI Group  analyst Vijay Kumar   maintains Baxter International (NYSE:BAX) with a Outperform and lowers the price target from $23 to $22.
